Name: users
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "auth"."users" ORDER BY "display_name" ASC LIMIT 3 OFFSET 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.base"."display_name" AS "displayName") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
